⚙️ Services
Star Economy
How Stars Work
Stars (★) are SocialHub's on-chain currency powered by APTM on the Apertum blockchain. Every action has a real cost and every creator earns real money — automatically, with no middlemen. Platform fees go directly to admin_revenue/global and are completely separate from creator earnings. 100% on-chain transparency.
📡 Broadcasting — 100% Platform Revenue
These are creation fees. Every star spent goes to the platform treasury. No creator split on your own posts.
Text Broadcast 1.2 ★ → 100% Platform
Image / Photo Broadcast 3.0 ★ → 100% Platform
Video Broadcast 10.0 ★ → 100% Platform
Boost Post to Top of Feed 10.0 ★ → 100% Platform
▶ Post a Flick (short video) 5.0 ★ → 100% Platform
Post as Daily Signal (24h story) 1.0 ★ → 100% Platform
Promote Existing Post to Signal 1.0 ★ → 100% Platform
Create a Community Hub 1,000 ★ → 100% Platform
❤ Global Feed Interactions — 80 / 20 Split
Every like, comment, and reply on the global feed costs 1★. The creator keeps 80% automatically.
Hype (Like) a Post +0.8 ★ Creator 0.2 ★ Platform
Comment on a Post +0.8 ★ Creator 0.2 ★ Platform
Reply to a Comment +0.8 ★ Commenter 0.2 ★ Platform
Like a Comment +0.8 ★ Commenter 0.2 ★ Platform
Hype a Daily Signal +0.8 ★ Creator 0.2 ★ Platform
▶ Flicks — Short Video Feed
Flicks are short vertical videos. The same 80/20 split applies — creators earn on every interaction their Flick receives.
Like (Hype) a Flick +0.8 ★ Creator 0.2 ★ Platform
Comment on a Flick +0.8 ★ Creator 0.2 ★ Platform
Like a Flick Comment +0.8 ★ Commenter 0.2 ★ Platform
Reply to a Flick Comment +0.8 ★ Commenter 0.2 ★ Platform
Rain Stars on a Flick +0.9 ★ Creator 0.1 ★ Platform
🤝 Networking & Profiles
Following rewards creators with 90%. Profile likes use the standard 80/20 split, consistent with feed likes.
Follow a Creator +0.9 ★ Creator 0.1 ★ Platform
Like a Profile (Hero Like) +0.9 ★ Creator 0.1 ★ Platform
Follow a Community Hub +0.9 ★ Hub Owner 0.1 ★ Platform
🏠 Community Hub — Landlord Model
Hub owners earn passive income on every interaction inside their Hub. When a guest posts and gets a like or comment, the split is three-way. When the owner interacts with their own content, the standard 80/20 applies.
Guest Interaction (like/comment on someone else's post in the Hub)
→ Post Author (Guest Creator) +0.4 ★ (40%)
→ Hub Owner (Landlord Earnings) +0.4 ★ (40%)
→ Platform 0.2 ★ (20%)
Owner Interaction (like/comment on your own post in your Hub)
→ Hub Owner +0.8 ★ (80%)
→ Platform 0.2 ★ (20%)
🌧️ Tipping & Rain — 90 / 10 Split
Direct Star transfers. The highest creator cut on the platform — 90% goes straight to the creator, no questions asked.
Profile Tip (any amount) 90% to Creator 10% Platform
Rain on a Post (5 / 10 / 20 ★) 90% to Creator 10% Platform
Dice Roll Tip (1–10 ★ random) 90% to Creator 10% Platform
🔒 Transparency & Revenue Separation
Platform Revenue Pool admin_revenue/global
Creator Earnings Pool user_balances / creatorStars
Platform & Creator Funds Mixed? ✗ Never — fully separated
Withdraw Method MetaMask · On-Chain APTM
Media Storage Firebase Storage
MetaMask Required For Deposit · Withdraw · Register
MetaMask Required For Posts / Tips? ✓ Zero Popups
⚡ Quick Reference — Every Split at a Glance
Broadcasting / Boosting / Hub Creation 100% Platform
Global Feed — Likes, Comments, Replies 80% Creator · 20% Platform
Profile Like 80% Creator · 20% Platform
Follow a Creator 90% Creator · 10% Platform
Hub Follow 90% Hub Owner · 10% Platform
Hub Guest Interaction 40% Creator · 40% Hub Owner · 20% Platform
Hub Owner Interaction 80% Owner · 20% Platform
Tips & Rain 90% Creator · 10% Platform

Buy Stars
Deposit USDT (BEP-20) to receive Stars.  1 USDT = 100 ★
You need 2 things in your BSC wallet:
🟡
BNB — for gas fees on BSC. Around $0.50 worth is enough for many transactions.
💵
USDT (BEP-20) — any amount. Every $1 = 100 Stars.
3 steps to get started:
1
Buy BNB + USDT on Binance, OKX, Bybit, or any major exchange.
2
Withdraw both to BSC Network (BEP-20). Not Ethereum. Not TRC-20.
3
Connect your wallet here, enter your USDT amount, and tap Convert →
⚠ Wrong network = lost funds. Always select BNB Smart Chain (BSC) when withdrawing from any exchange.

◈ How Community Hubs Work

Own a piece of SocialHub. Launch a themed Hub, attract creators, and earn from every interaction inside your community.

1
Start a Community Hub

Launch your own themed Hub for a one-time cost of 1,000 ★. Choose a name, write a description, and provide a header image URL. Your Hub is listed in the global Communities directory the moment it goes live.

2
Broadcasting Inside a Hub

Broadcast costs inside a Hub are identical to the global feed: Text 1.2 ★ Image 3 ★ Video 10 ★. 100% of the broadcast fee goes to the platform. Posts made inside a Hub appear only in that Hub’s feed — they do not appear in the Global Feed.

3
Owner Hosting — 80% on Your Own Posts

When you post inside your own Hub and someone likes or comments, you earn 80% (0.8 ★) directly into your earned-star balance. The platform keeps 20% (0.2 ★).

4
Landlord Split — 40% on Guest Posts & Comments

When a guest posts in your Hub and receives a like or a comment, the split is three-way: the guest creator earns 40% (0.4 ★), you (the Hub owner) earn 40% (0.4 ★) as Landlord Earnings, and the platform keeps 20% (0.2 ★). Every landlord earn event is labelled “Landlord Earnings from [Hub Name]” in your Ledger.

5
Comment Hypes Inside a Hub — 40 / 40 / 20

When User B likes User A’s comment inside your Hub, the split is: 40% (0.4 ★) to User A (the commenter), 40% (0.4 ★) to you as Landlord Earnings, and 20% (0.2 ★) to the platform.

6
Community Memberships & the Unified Following Feed

Inside any Hub, tap + Follow Hub to become a member. Following a Community costs 1 ★, with 90% (0.9 ★) going directly to the Community Creator’s earned-star balance and 10% (0.1 ★) to the platform.

Once you follow a Hub, its posts appear automatically in the ♡ Following tab on the home feed alongside posts from individual creators you follow — giving you a single, unified curated stream.

Social Hub Ecosystem: The Sovereign Creator Protocol

Mission

Returning financial sovereignty to creators. SocialHub is a Web3 social platform where creator earnings are settled on-chain via Apertum smart contracts — verifiable by anyone, withdrawable any time.

The Star Economy

  • 80/20 Split: Creators keep 80% of all Hype revenue.
  • 90/10 Split: Users keep 90% of engagement revenue from comments and follows.
  • Hub Landlord Model: Community Hub owners earn 40% of all guest post interaction revenue.

Entry Filter

Community Hub creation requires a one-time 1,000 Star fee to ensure high-quality content.

Mailbox & Communications

A one-time 25 Star activation fee unlocks private direct messaging between sovereign users.

Global Future

Multi-chain support coming soon.

Terms of Service

Transactions

  • All Star transactions are final and irreversible.
  • Stars cannot be refunded.

User Responsibility

  • Users are solely responsible for their own wallet security.
  • The platform cannot recover lost wallets or reverse transactions.

Conduct

  • Malicious content, bots, or harassment will result in a shadow-ban or suspension.
  • Users may report posts using the 🚩 Report button.

Platform Fees

Fees (20% on Hypes, 10% on Comments/Follows) are automated via the protocol and cannot be waived.

Privacy Policy

Data Hosting

All data is hosted on Google Firebase infrastructure.

What We Store

  • Your public wallet address
  • Display name and avatar URL
  • Posts, comments, and interactions
  • Star transaction ledger
  • Direct messages (if Mailbox is active)

Message Privacy

The UI provides private inboxes visible only to participants. Users should be aware that communications reside on Firebase infrastructure.

Blockchain Transparency

Your wallet address is publicly visible on the Apertum blockchain. All on-chain transactions are permanently auditable.

No Advertising

SocialHub does not sell your data. Revenue is entirely from protocol transaction fees.
